title: CAST AI Cost Report
description: A Cost Report provides efficiency metrics and cost data for a cluster, including CPU and memory utilization and potential savings.

clusterId.description: ID of the cluster this report covers.

totalMonthlyCost.description: Total monthly cost in USD before optimization.

optimizedMonthlyCost.description: Projected monthly cost in USD after optimization.

savingsPercentage.description: Percentage of costs saved through optimization.
